page_metadata.biotools__summary: Gibbs Motif Sampler allows you to identify motifs, conserved regions, in DNA or protein sequences.  This tool can be applied for the detection of transcription factor binding sites (TFBS).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Gibbs Motif Sampler allows you to identify motifs, conserved regions, in DNA or protein sequences.  This tool can be applied for the detection of transcription factor binding sites (TFBS).
